name: Port Drift Detector
summary: Cross-repo drift detection between paired implementations (e.g., prototype + canonical). Reads a markdown ledger (PORTING_NOTES.md or similar) + recent git…
description: Cross-repo drift detection between paired implementations (e.g., prototype + canonical). Reads a markdown ledger (PORTING_NOTES.md or similar) + recent git history of both repos. Pure git + awk + bash, no LLM cost. Three states: quiet, capture-needed (new commits not in ledger), backlog-growing (pending count went up). Pairs with a weekly launchd job for autonomous reporting.
author: marvelousempire
